meta.title: Conflux Atlas — Alpha Movie

legend.bulge: Outline pulse scales with share velocity + |net migration|

meta.honesty: Alpha build: hold-shares between anchors; event deltas rewrite nodes when edges fire. Pre-1900 beacons are narrative markers only — the numeric desk starts ~1900.

events.title: 1948 Arab–Israeli War / Nakba / Jewish exodus wave
Iranian Revolution and post-1979 Jewish emigration
Syrian Civil War & regional refugee crisis

beacons.title: Prophethood of Muhammad & Unification of Arabia
beacons.video_role: Origin point for Islamic demographic expansion
beacons.significance: Formation of early Muslim community; initial religious consolidation

beacons.title: Rashidun Conquests (Arabia → Levant, Egypt, Persia)
beacons.video_role: First major wave of Islamic demographic change
beacons.significance: Rapid territorial expansion; gradual religious shift in conquered regions

beacons.title: Umayyad Caliphate Expansion (to Spain & Central Asia)
beacons.video_role: Spread of Islam across three continents

beacons.title: Abbasid Caliphate & Cultural Golden Age
beacons.video_role: Stabilization and deepening of Muslim majorities
beacons.significance: Administrative integration; conversion acceleration in Persia & North Africa

beacons.title: Crusades & Counter-Crusades
beacons.video_role: Religious conflict and demographic flux in Levant
beacons.significance: Temporary Christian polities in Levant; population displacements

beacons.title: Mongol Invasions + Mamluk Period
beacons.significance: Destruction and recovery; shifts in urban populations

beacons.title: Rise & Expansion of Ottoman Empire
beacons.significance: Turkish settlement in Anatolia & Balkans; millet system

beacons.title: Conquest of Constantinople + Further Expansion
beacons.significance: Major population movements and religious policy shifts

beacons.title: Ottoman Defeat + Greco-Turkish Population Exchange
beacons.video_role: First large-scale modern engineered demographic change

beacons.title: Arab-Israeli War + Jewish Exoduses from Arab Countries
beacons.significance: Large-scale Jewish refugee movements out of MENA

beacons.title: Lebanese Civil War
beacons.significance: Multi-sided displacement of Christians, Palestinians, and others

beacons.title: Iranian Revolution
beacons.significance: Shift in religious governance + emigration of minorities

beacons.title: Syrian Civil War & Regional Refugee Crisis
beacons.significance: Millions displaced across MENA and into Europe

settlement_tape.note: Pew 2010 share claim hits 2020 census band
ARDA 2005 misses a later Pew band — partial miss
CBS Madaf Jewish counts settle against WJP overlay
ARDA recovers on a calmer polity
Definition gap claim: CJP≠Pew Jewish — expected, routed separately
One Barometer miss under shock window

tour_beacons.title: Lausanne population exchange
tour_beacons.blurb: Greece ↔ Turkey: a forced bilateral swap. Watch the edge thicken and node bands twitch.

tour_beacons.title: 1948 war & Jewish exodus corridors
tour_beacons.blurb: Multiple origin→Israel bursts. Israel's Jewish band grows; source countries lose Jewish share.

tour_beacons.title: Lebanese Civil War
tour_beacons.blurb: Outflows to France and neighbors. Confidence bleeds where citations go quiet.

tour_beacons.title: Iranian Revolution
tour_beacons.blurb: Jewish emigration toward Israel — a thin but sharp edge on the map.

tour_beacons.title: Syrian Civil War refugees
tour_beacons.blurb: UNHCR-scale stocks to Turkey, Lebanon, Jordan, Egypt, Germany, Iraq. Stocks ≠ flows — we say so.
